Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Piccinini (415-345-8610) of Law Offices of Daniel Piccinini for Carland Inc., petitioner and moving party / Wayne K. Snodgrass (415-554-4675) of SF City Attorney for San Franciso Rent Stabilazation and Arbitration Board for respondent and opposing party

ARGUED - Following oral argument Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported

Petitioner Carland Inc.'S Hearing On Petition For Issuanse Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Petitioner Carland Inc.'S Hearing On Petition For Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate is Continued to February 9, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Administrative Mandamus , And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Piccinini, Esq., Law Office, 415-345-8610, for Petitioner and moving party (no card)

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PETITIONER CARLAND INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Administrative Mandamus. Alternative writ will be issued for a hearing on February 7, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Briefing to comply with the time frames set forth in Code of Civil Procedure 1005. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
